heard.description: the surface form (heard/extracted mention) this decision resolved

band.description: auto (≥ auto threshold, silent link) · provisional (reviewable link) · new (created a fresh provisional entity)

corpusPrior.description: establishment multiplier (sighting count × recency); neutral 1.0 for a fresh entity, only boosts

crossSourceCorroboration.description: INPUT multiplier (#74 correlator) — defaults to neutral 1.0; no producer feeds it yet

personAffinity.description: INPUT multiplier (speaker/participant adjacency in the entity graph) — defaults to neutral 1.0; no producer yet

margin.description: winner score minus rival score — small ⇒ ambiguous

ambiguous.description: true ⇒ a plausible rival scored within Δ; a silent auto-link was downgraded to reviewable

override.description: true ⇒ resolved by a sovereign user override (pinned surface form), bypassing the score
